_comment: Intentional, reasoned exceptions for the required-status-check drift watcher (see .github/scripts/required_check_drift.py). The watcher fails if any repo listed in required_check_config.json no longer requires its security-load-bearing context (the lockfile-registry merge block, or the overclaim-honesty merge block) on its default branch. This allowlist is expected to stay EMPTY — there is no legitimate reason to stop requiring these merge blocks on a wired repo. 'ignore_repos' skips a wired repo by short name (e.g. 'docs-site') across ALL checks; add an entry only with a documented reason and a plan to re-wire.
